name: Kling 3.0
useCase: Create AI-generated video clips with synchronized audio from text prompts.

name: Runway Gen-4.5
useCase: Professional AI video generation with granular control over motion, style, and camera movement.

name: ElevenLabs v3
useCase: Voice cloning, text-to-speech, and audio dubbing with the most expressive AI voice model available.

name: Google Lyria 3
useCase: Generate custom music tracks and soundscapes directly within Google Gemini for content creation.

name: Canva AI Suite
useCase: AI-powered design tools including Magic Write, Magic Edit, and text-to-image — now accessible within Claude and ChatGPT.

name: Make.com
useCase: Visual automation builder connecting apps and AI services. Named Best AI Automation Platform. Build complex workflows without code.

name: Zapier
useCase: Workflow automation with new agent governance features for controlling AI-powered automations at scale.

name: Apple Creator Studio
useCase: Apple's answer to Adobe Creative Suite with AI integration. Positioned to undercut Adobe's pricing dramatically.

name: PixVerse R1
useCase: AI video generation with emphasis on consistent character and style across clips.

name: Seedance 2.0
useCase: Budget-friendly AI video generation delivering near-frontier quality. The 'DeepSeek moment' for AI video.

name: OpenClaw
useCase: Open-source AI agent framework that went viral with 116K GitHub stars. Enables autonomous AI task execution.

name: HeyGen
useCase: Create AI avatar videos for marketing, training, and content. Used in Market Intel's own production pipeline.

name: Synthesia
useCase: Enterprise-grade AI video creation with customizable avatars. Ideal for training materials and corporate communications.

name: Google Veo 3.1
useCase: Generate native vertical (9:16) AI video for YouTube Shorts and social media directly within Google's ecosystem.

name: Reddit Max Campaigns
useCase: AI-powered Reddit ad automation with transparent optimization. Delivers 17% lower CPA than Google/Meta alternatives.

name: Perplexity Computer
useCase: Describe a goal, walk away, and get a finished deliverable. Coordinates 19 AI models to complete entire marketing projects end-to-end — research, writing, design, and publishing.

name: Descript
useCase: AI-powered video and podcast editor. Underlord assistant handles B-roll placement, filler word removal, and integrates Kling AI v3 and Sora 2 for generative video directly in the timeline.

name: Pictory 2.0
useCase: Full AI video platform with avatars, generative video, interactive hosting, brand kits, Chrome extension, and PowerPoint plugin. Competes with HeyGen and Synthesia.

name: GPT-5.4
useCase: OpenAI's latest model with 1M token context window. Back-to-back release with GPT-5.3 Instant amid Pentagon controversy and 295% uninstall spike.

name: Runway Characters
useCase: Real-time video avatar API that turns a single reference image into a conversational brand presence. Zero fine-tuning, deploy anywhere via API. Early partners include the BBC.

name: Adobe Photoshop AI Assistant
useCase: Plain-language image editing for non-designers. Firefly now integrates OpenAI, Runway, and Google models inside one workspace. Public beta live for all Photoshop users.

name: Higgsfield Soul Cast
useCase: AI actor casting system with parametric character design. Solves character consistency across video scenes — no talent sourcing required.

name: CapCut AI Video Maker
useCase: Rebuilt storyboard-to-video tool that drops AI video production to 15 minutes at zero cost. Ideal for SMB content teams producing social video at scale.

name: Gamma Imagine
useCase: AI image generation built into Gamma's presentation platform. Challenges Canva and Adobe by generating on-brand visuals directly inside the content creation workflow.

name: NVIDIA NemoClaw
useCase: Agentic AI platform for autonomous marketing workflows. Self-evolving agents that can operate entire campaign pipelines with enterprise safety guardrails via OpenShell.

name: Claude Dispatch
useCase: Mobile-to-desktop AI content automation. Send tasks from your phone, Claude executes multi-step workflows on desktop. Real production workflows already running for content creation.

name: Google Vids
useCase: AI video generation free for every Google account. 10 clips per month via Veo 3.1. Ideal for social content and quick marketing videos. Note: AI content labeling workflow needed before publishing at scale.

name: Google Gemma 4
useCase: Free open-source AI model that runs locally on your laptop. No API fees, no subscription, no data leaving your machine. Eliminates costs for SMB content teams — though falls short of paid frontier models.

name: HeyGen Avatar V
useCase: Record yourself once (15 seconds) and never re-record for a different campaign look again. Generates consistent AI avatar videos across campaigns from a single reference recording.

name: Microsoft MAI
useCase: Microsoft's own AI model stack in Foundry. Transcription at $0.36/hour and custom brand voice from seconds of audio — reducing OpenAI dependence while offering enterprise-grade audio AI.

name: ElevenLabs ElevenMusic
useCase: Legally-licensed AI music generation app. Create custom music tracks for content with a proper licensing marketplace — solving the copyright concern that plagued earlier AI music tools.

name: Claude Design
pricing: Included with Claude Pro ($20/mo) and Team plans
useCase: Prompt-to-prototype tool for pitch decks, landing pages, and marketing visuals. Sent Figma stock down 7% on launch day. Note: IP gray zones around generated designs that agencies should understand.

name: Descript API
useCase: Transcript-based video editing now chainable to Claude and GPT automations. Enables 'video waterfall' workflows where a single recording auto-generates multiple content formats.
